title: The Publisher's Role in the E-Waste Lifecycle
description: This flowchart illustrates how an educational publisher like Oxford University Press contributes to and can help manage the e-waste lifecycle, from content creation to product disposal.
elements: Product Distribution (Physical Books vs. E-books/Online Platforms)
End-of-Life (Disposal as E-Waste for digital devices)
relationships: Publisher creates educational content for both physical and digital mediums
Digital content requires electronic devices for access, creating future e-waste
Publisher can influence the cycle through sustainable production and promoting device longevity/take-back programs
The end-of-life of devices used to access content becomes a part of the e-waste stream
